title: Isolation of human primary neutrophils
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9nb81","text":"This protocol was designed for the isolation of human primary neutrophils from full blood or buffy coats. Its thorough optimisation was focused on minimisation of the non-specific activation and population purity. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"1nrsc","text":"○ take all reagents out of the refrigerator, temper to room temperature","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fvvgb","text":"○ supplement the media with FBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7m7p4","text":"○ prepare 1X ACK ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"crf8a","text":"○ work carefully not to activate the neutrophils","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ah8k6","text":"○ supplement the media with FBS right before use (FBS supplement optional or adjustable)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3kk6d","text":"○ prepare 1X ACK right before use","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"d32cs","text":"○ RPMI-1640 + HEPES (Sigma-Aldrich, #R5886) supplemented with 0.2% heat-inactivated and filtered FBS (Sigma-Aldrich, #F7524)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7h8s8","text":"○ colour-free RPMI-1640 (Carl Roth, #9104.1) optionally supplemented with 0.2% heat-inactivated and filtered FBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fp32k","text":"○ 1x PBS (Sigma-Aldrich, #P2272)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ftv4","text":"○ 6% Dextran (Sigma-Aldrich, #31392), 150mM NaCl (Sigma-Aldrich, #S9888) in Milli-Q water, filtered","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6qn36","text":"○ 10x ACK buffer - 1.5M NH4Cl (Sigma-Aldrich, #09718), 100mM KHCO3 (Sigma-Aldrich, #60339), 1mM EDTA disodium salt dihydrate (Sigma-Aldrich, #E5134) in tissue culture water, pH 7.2, filtered","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":26,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":65,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: transfer Sample from EDTA vacuette tube into 50ml Falcon tube
add 1 mL of Room temperature Phosphate buffered saline Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P2272 per 1 mL of Sample
add 1 mL of Room temperature 6% Dextran, 150mM NaCl Contributed by users per 1 mL of Sample
invert the tube 10 times
incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00 without inverting the tube anymore
transfer the upper phase into new 50ml Falcon tube, avoid transfer of any erythrocytes from the lower phase
spin at 290 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes, swing-up rotor centrifuge (5702, Eppendorf, 022626001)
using Pasteur pipette and 2 1ml-pipette tips, discard the supernatant
gently resuspend pellet in 15 mL Room temperature 1X ACK buffer Contributed by users
first, resuspend in 5 mL , then, add the remaining 10 mL
incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00, starting from the addition of ACK
add 35 mL Room temperature Phosphate buffered saline Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P2272 to neutralise the lysis
invert the tube 10 times
spin at 290 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes, swing-up rotor
using Pasteur pipette and 2 1ml-pipette tips, discard the supernatant, remove as much red debris as possible
gently resuspend pellet in 10 mL Room temperature RPMI+, 0.2% FBS Contributed by users

carefully load 10 mL Room temperature Ficoll-Paque™ PLUS density gradient media Cytiva Life Sciences Catalog #17144002 (CAS: 26873-85-8) at the bottom of the tube, make sure not to create any bubbles that would destroy the interface, load at the minimum speed
spin at 1260 rcf, Room temperature, 30 minutes, swing-up rotor (S4x750), acceleration and brake ramp: 5 Centrifuge (5910 R, Eppendorf, 5943000548) Phase layout after centrifugation
with a cut 1ml pipette tip or 5ml pipette tip, transfer PBMCs from the interface into new 15ml Falcon tube
using Pasteur pipette and 2 1ml-pipette tips, remove the rest of the supernatant
gently resuspend pellet in 5 mL, (adjustable) Room temperature ROTI®Cell RPMI-1640 Carl Roth Catalog #9104.1 (supplementing with FBS optional)
count the cells manually or using automated cell counter

In Water (sterile-filtered BioReagent suitable for cell culture) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #W3500 (CAS: 7732-18-5) dissolve 1.5 M Ammonium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #09718 (CAS: 12125-02-9) , 100 mM Potassium bicarbonate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #60339 (CAS: 298-14-6) , and 1 mM Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid disodium salt dihydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #E5134 (CAS: 6381-92-6) - further referred to as 10x ACK buffer Contributed by users
With HCl or NaOH, adjust to pH 7.2

In Water (sterile-filtered BioReagent suitable for cell culture) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #W3500 (CAS: 7732-18-5) dissolve 6 % (w/v) Dextran from Leuconostoc spp. Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #31392 (CAS: 9004-54-0) and 150 mM Sodium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S9888 (CAS: 7647-14-5) - further referred to as 6% Dextran, 150mM NaCl Contributed by users
Filter with 0.22µm filter
Store in the refrigerator for max 2 months, optionally aliquot per 1.5 mL
Filter with 0.22µm filter
Store in the refrigerator
Take all reagents out of the refrigerator, temper to room temperature

Dilute 1.5 mL 10x ACK buffer Contributed by users to 1X ACK buffer Contributed by users with Water (sterile-filtered BioReagent suitable for cell culture) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #W3500 (CAS: 7732-18-5)

Optionally, supplement 10 mL RPMI-1640 Medium Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #R5886 with 0.2 % (v/v), adjustable heat inactivated and filtered Fetal Bovine Serum Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #F7524 - further referred to as RPMI+, 0.2% FBS Contributed by users
creator: Kateřina Paldusová
